response.overview: In the 17th century, witchcraft was persecuted for the evil it was believed to possess—but not for a young initiate from the village of Jabaloyas, not for Luna.  The appointed night is near, and Luna longs to join the witches. Her brother Juan tries to pull her away from such cults and pagan beliefs, attempting to bring her closer to God. However, she is already part of the night.  After the rejection of those around her, Luna will go into the forest to become one more witch. A cry for help on a night of ritual.
response.title: Noche de Ritual
